name: Good Morning Basket
recipeInstructions:
Combine the pancake ingredients in a large bowl and blend well. Store in an airtight container in the fridge until ready for use.
To make pancakes, beat 2 eggs in a mixing bowl. Gradually beat in 1/3 cup of oil. Alternately beat in 2 cups of the pancake mix and 1 cup of water. Cook on a lightly greased griddle. Yield about 12 5-inch pancakes. The mix will make 4 batches of pancakes.
For syrup:
Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir in remaining ingredients, whisking constantly until sugar dissolves and mixture thickens slightly, 3-4 minutes. Place in a pretty container, store in the fridge until gift giving. Reheat to serve with pancakes.
This is nice in a basket with some linen napkins and a pancake turner.
